limitation: Playwright cannot simulate installed PWA or real Android device. Desktop browser fully tested. Mobile viewport CSS verified via code audit. PWA manifest verified via fetch. Real device testing requires manual verification.

audit_summary.app_score: UNTESTABLE — PWA manifest verified, install behaviour requires real device

critical_findings.issue: BRAND INCONSISTENCY — FIXED THIS SESSION. PWA manifest had 'BIQC', page title had 'BIQC - Business IQ Centre', meta tags had 'BIQC'. All corrected to 'BIQc'. Theme color changed from #0066FF (blue, legacy) to #0F1720 (Liquid Steel dark). Requires deployment.

Market page shows 'AWAITING INTELLIGENCE' with all signals showing 'Awaiting data'. The cognitive snapshot for the current user does not contain the new action_plan or market_intelligence data. The Edge Function with deterministic chain was deployed but the cached snapshot (30min TTL) has not refreshed yet. User must force refresh via {force: true} or wait for TTL expiry.
critical_findings.status: DEPLOYMENT TIMING — resolves after snapshot TTL expires or force refresh

high_findings.issue: Tutorial modal ('INTEGRATIONS — Connect Your Tools') blocks entire page content on every visit. Modal has white background on dark theme (style mismatch). No 'Don't show again' option. Appears every session.
high_findings.fix: Store tutorial dismissal in localStorage. Style modal with Liquid Steel dark theme.

high_findings.issue: Market page load time: 15.43 seconds. During this time user sees 'Market Intelligence' header with 'Awaiting data' cards. Edge Function cold start + API waterfall contributes. warm-cognitive-engine calls show ERR_ABORTED (cancelled by page navigation).
BIQc Insights loading animation ('we caught some things overnight') persists for 30-60 seconds on production. No fallback to cached data. User sees animation with no content for nearly a minute.

medium_findings.issue: Homepage hero says 'Book a live demo' — not aligned with self-serve signup flow. CTA should be 'Get started' or 'Start free'.
Integration page tutorial modal has WHITE background (#FFFFFF) on Liquid Steel dark theme. Jarring visual contrast. Should match dark theme.

Channel Intelligence shows 'CRM (HubSpot) Live' and 'Email Platform Live' — correct. But 'Connect CRM' action in Drift Analysis still shows as incomplete despite HubSpot being connected. Data source detection doesn't cross-reference channel status.

low_findings.issue: Edge Function warm-cognitive-engine calls show ERR_ABORTED in console. These are fire-and-forget warmup pings cancelled by page navigation. Non-blocking but adds console noise.

tutorial_violations.issue: Tutorial modal appears every session. White background on dark theme. No 'Don't show again' option.
Tutorial overlay reported in previous audit. May still appear on first load.

browser_vs_app_inconsistencies.issue: Brand name was 'BIQC' — now fixed to 'BIQc'
Not tested — requires real device PWA install

qualifies_because: 5 SQL deterministic engines execute before every LLM call (detect_contradictions → update_escalation → calibrate_pressure → decay_evidence → compute_market_risk_weight)
Consequence modelling in Action Plan (probability shifts, blindside risk, decision windows)
Drift detection with cohort/trust/authority/position gap analysis
Misalignment index comparing intent vs behaviour
Resolution queue with one-click actions (Auto-Email, Quick-SMS, Hand-Off)
Unified cognitive snapshot — single source of truth rendered across 10+ pages
Pressure calibration that never decreases while position is elevated
cognition_features_observed: Inevitability modelling with probability, impact, and window
Founder vitals (capacity index, fatigue, email stress)
how_it_serves_smb_operator: Australian English, direct, no corporate fluff
References specific deal names, contact names, dollar amounts
Priority compression (ONE thing to focus on)
what_is_missing: Action Plan not rendering on production (cached snapshot stale)
Tutorial modals block content on every session
Market page 15s+ load time on production
Stripe gating not implemented (all features ungated)
Channel APIs are shells (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn)
No email notification for intelligence changes
No mobile push notifications for critical alerts
retention_risk_if_missing_persists: 15s+ load time → users abandon before seeing intelligence
No action plan visible → undermines 'cognition' positioning
No paid tier → no revenue, no sustainability

priority_remediation_order: 1. Deploy latest code (branding fixes + shell page wiring)
2. Force refresh cognitive snapshot ({force: true}) to populate Action Plan
4. Reduce BIQc Insights initial load time (cached-first strategy)
6. Wire real channel APIs (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn)
